title: The 30-Day Blood Pressure Reset Challenge Starts May 1 — Here's What's Inside
author: Joel Polley
body:
The 30-Day Blood Pressure Reset Challenge Starts May 1

On May 1, we're launching a cohort-based challenge that's going to change how you think about blood pressure management.

This isn't another generic "health challenge." It's a 30-day intensive with daily coaching, weekly live sessions with me, your complete BP Reset Kit, AND a live ticket to a Barbara O'Neill wellness session. You'll have a community of people doing this alongside you — no lonely journey.

What You Get

  • Daily coaching — actionable protocols delivered to your inbox every single day
  • Weekly live sessions — real-time Q&A and accountability with the group
  • BP Reset Kit — the complete herb protocol and lifestyle toolkit
  • Barbara O'Neill LIVE ticket — exclusive wellness session included
  • Community — 30 days of support from people committed to the same reset

The 4-Week Breakdown

Week 1: Baseline & Awareness
We start by getting clear on YOUR baseline. Blood pressure isn't one-size-fits-all, and neither is the fix. You'll track your patterns, identify your triggers, and get a personalized assessment.

Week 2: The Herb Protocol
This is where the reset begins. You'll introduce the scientifically-backed herbal protocol designed to address the root mechanisms driving elevated BP. Hibiscus, magnesium, adaptogenic herbs — the whole arsenal, delivered daily with precise dosing.

Week 3: Lifestyle Integration
Herbs work best when lifestyle supports them. Week 3 focuses on the behaviors that matter: sleep quality, stress resilience, movement patterns, and how to handle real-world stressors without spiking your pressure.

Week 4: Doctor Conversation
By Week 4, many people are ready to have a different conversation with their doctor. We'll prepare you with your data, your protocol, and the language to discuss what's working and whether medication adjustments make sense.

Know Your Archetype

Not all high blood pressure is the same. Neither are the fixes. During the challenge, you'll identify your BP archetype:

  • The Cortisol Storm — Stress-driven spikes, racing thoughts, tension headaches
  • The Insulin Rebel — Metabolic resistance, weight distribution shifts, morning sluggishness
  • The Estrogen Shift — Hormonal fluctuations, migraines, hot flashes, BP swings
  • The Pressure Phoenix — Long-standing elevation, medication resistance, genetic predisposition
  • The Thyroid Ghost — Metabolism gone quiet, fatigue, weight creep, BP elevation

Your archetype determines YOUR protocol. That's why this works.

Who This Is For

You're a fit if:

  • You have elevated blood pressure and want to address it naturally
  • You're on medication but your numbers still aren't where they should be
  • You're curious about the root causes your doctor hasn't discussed
  • You want a concrete 30-day protocol with real accountability
  • You're ready to invest in your cardiovascular health

You're probably not a fit if:

  • You have a blood pressure emergency or crisis (get to an ER)
  • You're looking for a quick fix without any effort on your part
  • You distrust herbs or natural approaches on principle

Early-Bird Access: $97

The challenge opens May 1 at $297. But if you commit now, you lock in the early-bird rate: $97.

That's one-third the regular price for the full experience: daily coaching, live sessions, Barbara O'Neill ticket, Reset Kit, and 30 days in a community that gets it.

Claim Your Early-Bird Spot — $97

Next cohort starts May 1. Spaces are limited to keep the community tight and the accountability real.
